---
name: Correct an Event
about: Report an error or suggest improvements to an existing event
title: 'Correct: '
labels: ['event-correction']
assignees: ''
---

## Event ID or Title

Which event needs correction? (link or event id, e.g., `event-0624-battle-of-badr`)

## What Is Wrong

Describe the inaccuracy or missing information.

## What Should It Be

Provide the corrected information with sources.

## Sources

Links to references supporting the correction.
